channel.title: about on tired, since 1985
channel.description: Recent content in about on tired, since 1985

item.title: What is this?
item.description: What is this blog? I keep a cheap notebook next to my studio station and log any changes, thoughts, ideas or progress after I’m done with a session. It’s brief enough that I figured “Why not use this as the basis for my continued efforts in song writing and sound exploration?”
